source.title: Forward and reverse hippocampal place-cell sequences during ripples.

confidence_rationale: Foundational paper establishing that hippocampal sequences during sharp-wave ripples come in two distinct directional flavours: reverse (post-run, evaluative) and forward (pre-run, anticipatory). Provides the temporal structure MECH-057b relies on for completion as a discrete detectable event -- the run-end reverse-replay marks completion of the just-finished sequence. Mapping to MECH-057b is partial: the paper documents the post-completion evaluative pulse but does not test that this pulse acts as a candidacy gate. Marked mixed because it strongly supports the claim that completion is a detectable discrete event, but does not directly address suppression of non-completing candidates.
failure_signatures: If reverse and forward replay were not temporally bound to run-end and pre-run pause epochs, the framing of completion as a discrete event-marker would weaken.
If pre-run forward replay did not contain the upcoming trajectory, the candidacy framing would lack temporal anchoring.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Hippocampal place-cell spike sequences recur in reverse order at the end of a run and in forward order in anticipation of a run, both coinciding with sharp waves; vector distances between place fields are preserved in the temporal structure.
mapping.ree_translation: Sequence completion is a discrete detectable event in the hippocampus -- the switch from reverse-replay (evaluative) to forward-replay (anticipatory) marks the boundary. MECH-057b uses this to argue that completion verification can serve as a gate signal: the reverse-replay pulse confirms a sequence ran to its end, after which forward-replay can re-emit candidates for the next run. The two directional modes provide the temporal structure on which a candidacy gate could operate.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Diba & Buzsaki document the sequences but do not test the gate function. The reverse/forward switch could be epiphenomenal of run timing rather than a control signal. A direct test would require silencing reverse-replay and observing whether forward-replay candidacy degrades.
mapping.source_context: Rats running on an elevated linear track; CA1 ensemble recording; sharp-wave ripple events during pause epochs.

confidence_components.notes: Foundational and well-established. Mapping discount reflects that the paper documents temporal structure but does not test the gate function MECH-057b posits.
